text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I was lectured for three hours by the counselor.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I was conducting an experiment. Nothing special.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I made a little mistake and ended up breaking all
the windows in the classroom.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was empty, so no one was hurt or anything. I
don't understand why they had to get so mad.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I was only half listening, yet I'm exhausted.
